====Pokémon==== This listing is of Raihan's known Pokémon in the Pokémon Journeys: The Series manga: {{anchor|Duraludon 4}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Raihan |width=68 |pkmn=Duraludon |giga=yes |type1=Steel |type2=Dragon |img=Raihan Duraludon JNM.png |img2=Raihan Gigantamax Duraludon JNM.png |cap2=Raihan's Gigantamax Duraludon |epnum=JNM10 |epname=Toughing It Out! |desc={{p|Duraludon}} is Raihan's only known Pokémon, as well as his ace. It is capable of [[Gigantamax]]ing. Raihan used it in his battle against {{an|Leon}}, where it went up against {{TP|Leon|Charizard}}, only to be defeated. Duraludon's known moves are {{m|Metal Claw}}, {{m|Stone Edge}}, and {{m|Steel Beam}}.
As a Gigantamax Duraludon, it can use {{m|Max Rockfall}} and {{m|Max Steelspike}}.}}
